commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR removes Chokidar awaitWriteFinish options from the Gateway config and skills runtime watchers and adds focused tests asserting those options are absent.

PR surface: Source -5, Tests +30. Total +25 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. the linked issue has concrete macOS sampling evidence and current source confirms the two watcher options, but I did not reproduce the original high-idle-CPU loop locally. The PR supplies after-fix macOS proof, not same-machine before/after reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - The remaining blockers are concrete code/test repairs on the PR branch: preserve change-triggered stability for config and polling SKILL.md writes while keeping the intended idle-overhead reduction.

target.title: perf(gateway): drop watcher awaitWriteFinish polling
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: #87256 reports high idle CPU on macOS gateway and points at the Gateway config reload watcher plus skills runtime watcher using Chokidar `awaitWriteFinish` polling.
- Solution: Remove `awaitWriteFinish` from those two watcher constructors and keep the existing OpenClaw debounce layers that already coalesce config reload and skills refresh work.
- What changed: `src/gateway/config-reload.ts`, `src/skills/runtime/refresh.ts`, and focused regression coverage in `src/gateway/config-reload.test.ts` and `src/skills/runtime/refresh.test.ts`.
- What did NOT change: No new public config/env switch, no watched path expansion, no channel/provider behavior change, and no skills discovery precedence or depth change.

Fixes #87256

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed:** Gateway config reload and skills runtime watchers no longer enable Chokidar `awaitWriteFinish` while a real macOS OpenClaw gateway can start, sit idle, and still observe config/skills watcher events.
- **Real environment tested:** macOS 26.5 arm64, Node v24.15.0, pnpm 11.2.2, OpenClaw 2026.6.2, worktree SHA `3acd0e3aa6`, isolated `OPENCLAW_HOME`/`OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR`/`OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH`, `OPENCLAW_SKIP_CHANNELS=1`.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
  ```bash
  EVIDENCE_DIR=/tmp/openclaw-issue-87256-evidence

  OPENCLAW_HOME="$EVIDENCE_DIR/home-after" \
    OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR="$EVIDENCE_DIR/state-after" \
    OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH="$EVIDENCE_DIR/home-after/.openclaw/openclaw.json" \
    OPENCLAW_SKIP_CHANNELS=1 \
    pnpm gateway:dev

  ps -p <gateway-pid> -o pid,ppid,%cpu,%mem,etime,command
  sample <gateway-pid> 5 -file "$EVIDENCE_DIR/after_sample.txt"
  grep -Ein 'awaitWriteFinish|stat\$|lstat|__opendir2|open\$NOCANCEL|uv_fs|chokidar' "$EVIDENCE_DIR/after_sample.txt"

  OPENCLAW_HOME="$EVIDENCE_DIR/home-after-reload" \
    OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR="$EVIDENCE_DIR/state-after-reload" \
    OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH="$EVIDENCE_DIR/home-after-reload/.openclaw/openclaw.json" \
    OPENCLAW_SKIP_CHANNELS=1 \
    OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT=19003 \
    pnpm gateway:dev
  # Edited the isolated openclaw.json to add gateway.reload.debounceMs=211.

  node --import tsx "$EVIDENCE_DIR/skills_watcher_live_proof.mjs"
  node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/config-reload.test.ts src/skills/runtime/refresh.test.ts
  node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/session-updates.test.ts
  ```
- **Evidence after fix:** Real gateway startup and idle process sampling on macOS:
  ```text
  2026-06-13T23:34:31.431+08:00 Dev config ready: $OPENCLAW_HOME/.openclaw/openclaw.json
  2026-06-13T23:34:31.438+08:00 Dev workspace ready: $OPENCLAW_HOME/.openclaw/workspace-dev
  2026-06-13T23:34:31.444+08:00 [gateway] loading configuration…
  2026-06-13T23:34:31.476+08:00 [gateway] resolving authentication…
  2026-06-13T23:34:32.391+08:00 [gateway] http server listening (9 plugins: acpx, bonjour, browser, canvas, device-pair, file-transfer, memory-core, phone-control, talk-voice; 0.9s)
  2026-06-13T23:34:32.392+08:00 [gateway] ready
  2026-06-13T23:34:32.826+08:00 [gateway/channels] skipping channel start (OPENCLAW_SKIP_CHANNELS=1 or OPENCLAW_SKIP_PROVIDERS=1)
  2026-06-13T23:34:42.995+08:00 [gateway] agent runtime plugins pre-warmed in 79ms

  Idle ps samples for PID 7520
  sample 23:35:44
    PID  PPID  %CPU %MEM ELAPSED COMMAND
   7520  7411   0.1  1.9   01:14 openclaw
  sample 23:35:49
    PID  PPID  %CPU %MEM ELAPSED COMMAND
   7520  7411   0.3  1.9   01:19 openclaw
  sample 23:35:54
    PID  PPID  %CPU %MEM ELAPSED COMMAND
   7520  7411   0.3  1.9   01:24 openclaw
  sample 23:35:59
    PID  PPID  %CPU %MEM ELAPSED COMMAND
   7520  7411   0.3  1.9   01:29 openclaw
  sample 23:36:04
    PID  PPID  %CPU %MEM ELAPSED COMMAND
   7520  7411   0.3  1.9   01:34 openclaw
  sample 23:36:09
    PID  PPID  %CPU %MEM ELAPSED COMMAND
   7520  7411   0.2  1.9   01:39 openclaw

  sample 7520 5 -file $EVIDENCE_DIR/after_sample.txt
  Sampling process 7520 for 5 seconds with 1 millisecond of run time between samples
  Sampling completed, processing symbols...

  Focused sample grep for awaitWriteFinish/stat/lstat/opendir/open/uv_fs/chokidar frames
  no matching frames
  ```

  Real config watcher event after editing the isolated config file:
  ```text
  2026-06-13T23:39:43.699+08:00 [gateway] ready
  2026-06-13T23:39:44.213+08:00 [gateway/channels] skipping channel start (OPENCLAW_SKIP_CHANNELS=1 or OPENCLAW_SKIP_PROVIDERS=1)
  2026-06-13T23:39:54.393+08:00 [gateway] agent runtime plugins pre-warmed in 88ms
  2026-06-13T23:40:09.554+08:00 [reload] config change detected; evaluating reload (gateway.reload)
  ```

  Real skills watcher event using the production `ensureSkillsWatcher` path and a live filesystem change under a temporary workspace:
  ```text
  real skills watcher live proof
  worktree sha: 3acd0e3aa6
  workspace: $EVIDENCE_DIR/skills-watch-workspace
  initial version: 0
  final version: 1781365326986
  events observed: 1
  {"workspaceDir":"$EVIDENCE_DIR/skills-watch-workspace","reason":"watch","changedPath":"$EVIDENCE_DIR/skills-watch-workspace/skills/live-watch-proof"}
  ```

  Regression commands also passed:
  ```text
  node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/config-reload.test.ts src/skills/runtime/refresh.test.ts
  [test] passed 2 Vitest shards in 10.94s

  node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/session-updates.test.ts
  [test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 3.54s
  ```
- **Observed result after fix:** The PR branch ran a real macOS gateway with channels skipped, stayed at 0.1-0.3% CPU after warmup, produced no sampled `awaitWriteFinish`/filesystem polling frames in the focused `sample` grep, detected an actual config-file change through the config watcher, and observed an actual skills-directory change through the production skills watcher path.
- **What was not tested:** I did not reproduce the reporter's exact Intel macOS 26.4.1 LaunchAgent/global npm setup. The parent commit also did not reproduce the reported 60-93% idle CPU in my isolated macOS 26.5 arm64 dev setup, so this proof does not claim a same-machine before/after CPU drop for that original environment.

## Regression Test Plan

- Coverage level: Unit tests plus real macOS runtime/function proof.
- Target test file: `src/gateway/config-reload.test.ts`, `src/skills/runtime/refresh.test.ts`, `src/auto-reply/reply/session-updates.test.ts`.
- Scenario locked in: Config watcher options preserve `ignoreInitial` and test polling without `awaitWriteFinish`; skills watcher options preserve bounded depth, symlink behavior, and ignore filtering without `awaitWriteFinish`; existing session update behavior remains covered.
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail: The code change only removes one Chokidar option from each watcher, so the narrow assertions protect the removed option while real macOS proof confirms the watcher surfaces still run.

## Root Cause

- Root cause: The two watcher surfaces named in #87256 enabled Chokidar `awaitWriteFinish`, which adds a dependency-level file-size stability gate and can use repeated `stat` checks during pending writes even though OpenClaw already debounces config reload and skills refresh work above Chokidar.
- Missing detection / guardrail: Existing tests covered reload/refresh behavior but did not assert that the gateway and skills watcher options avoid dependency-level `awaitWriteFinish` polling.
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
